name: icon-generator-plugin
description: Generate icon assets for iOS, macOS, Android, and web projects from a single master icon.

interface.shortDescription: Create platform-ready app and favicon assets.
interface.longDescription: Generate a 1024x1024 master icon with Codex image generation, then export validated icon assets for iOS, macOS, Android, and web projects.
defaultPrompt: Create app icons for this mobile project.
Generate iOS and Android launcher icons.
Make AppIcon assets from this image.
